---
id: delete-webhook
title: "DeleteWebhook"
description: "Permanently removes a webhook config from the workspace, stopping all future event notifications to that endpoint."
sidebar_label: "DeleteWebhook"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "delete api-method"
info_path: docs/api/superposition
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"DeleteWebhook"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/webhook/{name}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Permanently removes a webhook config from the workspace, stopping all future event notifications to that endpoint.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
